creator: igor.arabesc.pavlov@gmail.com
text:
I've successfully built i2pd v2.11.0 with LibreSSL. And there were no boost related issues.

# pkg info | grep i2pd
i2pd-2.11.0_1

# pkg info | grep libressl
libressl-2.4.4

# pkg info | grep boost
boost-all-1.62.0
boost-docs-1.62.0
boost-jam-1.62.0
boost-libs-1.62.0_1Boost.Python)
